title: 2Pcs Suction Hooks, Extra Strong Vacuum Suction Cup Hook, Reusable Heavy Duty Bathroom Hook, No Drilling Wall Shower Sucker Hooks Loadable 10kg for Kitchen Bathroom (Grey)
features: Ultra-strong Load-bearing: Vacuum suction cup hooks have extra large base diameter, double adsorption, firm and stable, not easy to fall off. The vacuum adsorption of each kitchen bathroom hook can hold up to 10 kg, so you don't have to worry about falling off. (Seamless suction cup hooks are not suitable for porous, bumpy, rough or textured surfaces.)

Non-Destructive Installation: Wall mounted suction hooks require no drilling, simply peel off the protective coating on the back of the suction cup hook, press it onto a clean surface and press the suction locking lever (leave it for 2-3 hours for better results). No need to worry about leaving unsightly holes or sticky stains on the wall at all.

Reusable: If you need to remove or reposition the shower hook, just pull up the locking lever of the sucker hook to open the vacuum suction cup, clean it and put it back into use. You can reuse and stick the removable suction cup hanger to where you want.

High Quality Material: The shell of the strong heavy duty wall hook is made of TPU rubber and ABS plastic shell, the surface is plated, waterproof, moisture-proof, corrosion-proof, rust-proof, smooth and bright surface, strong and stable, strong adsorption, durable.

Wide Range of Application: Waterproof suction towel holders are suitable for all kinds of smooth surfaces, such as windows, glass, marble, tiles and mirrors, etc., and can be used to hang a variety of items such as hats, bathrobes, towels, handbags, cooking tools, keys, kitchen utensils and other items in kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms and showers.
description: The suction cup hook's dual vacuum suction ensures functionality across varying temperatures. Requiring no glue or screws, it is easy to use and reusable, making it ideal for tenants and travellers as it leaves walls undamaged and scratch-free when moved. ● For the Bathroom Use this garland hook to hang shower curtains, bathrobes, sponges, and towels, keeping your bathroom tidier. ● For the Kitchen The garland rack can hold kitchen utensils, cookware, loofahs, and aprons, making your cooking time more convenient and hygienic. ● Living Room Use Organise charger cables, bags, keys, toys, hats, and scarves in bedrooms. They can even be used in living rooms to draw curtains, letting natural light in and allowing you to fully enjoy the pleasure of tidying your space. ● Decorative Use Hang seasonal, Halloween, Christmas wreaths, or other beautiful and charming decorations to adorn your home. PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS: ● Product Name: suction cup hook ● Material: ABS ● Colour: gunmetal grey ● Maximum weight: 10 kg ● Size: 8.5 x 6 x 3.5 cm / 3.32 x 2.36 x 1.38 in ● Applicable scenes: bathroom, kitchen, bedroom, wardrobe, office, school, hotel or shop, etc. WARM TIPS: 1.Do not stick the sucker hooks on painted walls, wood, concrete and other uneven surfaces. 2. The suction hooks can be firmly attached to marble, glass, metal and other smooth surfaces. INSTALLATION STEPS: 1.Clean and dry the installation area; 2. Peel off the protective film on the hook; 3. press the top firmly to squeeze the air and then lock the hook; 4. Re-use: please wash with warm water before re-installation; 5. No drilling, no screws, no tools required.
